CREATE TABLE colors (color String, id UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT groupArraySample(3)(color) as newcolors FROM colors;
SELECT groupArraySample(3, 987654321)(color) as newcolors FROM colors;
SELECT groupArraySample(3)(concat('light-', color)) as newcolors FROM colors;
SELECT groupArraySample(3)(color) as newcolors FROM (SELECT color FROM colors WHERE id <= 3);
SELECT groupArraySample(2)(color) as newcolors FROM colors WHERE color != 'red';
SELECT groupArraySample(4)(color) as newcolors FROM (SELECT color FROM colors ORDER BY id DESC);
SELECT groupArraySample(5, 42)(color) as newcolors FROM (SELECT color FROM colors WHERE id > 2) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE more_colors (color String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY color;
SELECT groupArraySample(3)(color) as newcolors FROM more_colors UNION ALL SELECT groupArraySample(2)(color) as other_colors FROM colors;
SELECT (SELECT groupArraySample(2)(color) FROM colors) AS random_colors, (SELECT count() FROM colors) AS total_colors;
WITH (SELECT color FROM colors LIMIT 3) AS limited_colors SELECT groupArraySample(3)(color) as newcolors FROM limited_colors;
